languages.text: "Любопытно, я никогда не видел{mf||а}, чтобы подобные операции проводили на себе сами".
"Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."
languages.original_text: "Любопытно, я никогда не видел{mf||а}, чтобы подобные операции проводили на себе сами".

traits.locale_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."
"Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."
"Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

languages.text: “太有意思了。我从未见过有人对自己进行这种手术。”
languages.original_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

traits.locale_text: “太有意思了。我从未见过有人对自己进行这种手术。”

languages.text: « Fascinant. C'est la première fois que je vois ce genre d'opération effectuée sur son propre corps. »
languages.original_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

traits.locale_text: « Fascinant. C'est la première fois que je vois ce genre d'opération effectuée sur son propre corps. »

languages.text: «Fascinante. Nunca había visto ejecutar esta clase de cirugía en el propio cirujano».
languages.original_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

traits.locale_text: «Fascinante. Nunca había visto ejecutar esta clase de cirugía en el propio cirujano».

languages.text: "Büyüleyici. Daha önce kendi üzerinde böyle ameliyatlar yapan birini hiç görmemiştim."
languages.original_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

traits.locale_text: "Büyüleyici. Daha önce kendi üzerinde böyle ameliyatlar yapan birini hiç görmemiştim."

languages.text: "Faszinierend. Ich habe noch nie erlebt, dass jemand derartige Operationen an sich selbst vornimmt."
languages.original_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

traits.locale_text: "Faszinierend. Ich habe noch nie erlebt, dass jemand derartige Operationen an sich selbst vornimmt."

languages.text: 「興味深い。自分自身にこのような手術を施すのを、私はこれまで見たことがない」
languages.original_text: "Fascinating. I have never seen such operations performed on oneself before."

traits.locale_text: 「興味深い。自分自身にこのような手術を施すのを、私はこれまで見たことがない」
